name: Retiro Bitcoin
description: Plan your financial independence with Bitcoin savings & projections
extendedDescription: A Bitcoin retirement planning calculator designed as a Fedi Mini App. Users input their initial savings (BTC or fiat), periodic contributions (daily/weekly/monthly), time horizon, expected annual return, and optional local inflation rate to project their financial independence path. Features include: interactive growth charts, real-time BTC price conversion via CoinGecko, multi-language support (ES/EN/PT/FR), dark/light theme, PDF report export, Safe Withdrawal Rate (SWR 4%) simulation, Google Calendar savings reminders, and CoinGecko price alerts setup guide. Integrates with Fedi via WebLN for Lightning payments (premium plan), Nostr NIP-07/NIP-78 for identity and saving plans, and window.fedi for currency/language preferences. Freemium model: free tier includes single scenario with basic results; premium ($1 USD/month or $10 USD lifetime via Lightning) unlocks 3 scenario comparison, PDF export, plan saving, and SWR simulation. Includes a referral CTA for buying BTC through Aureo (Mexico users). Fully mobile-first, works standalone outside Fedi.
